channel.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
channel.description: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

item.title: Adding auto increase number custom field to Sales Order Header
item.description: Dear Experts, I would like to add an auto increase numbering custom field with prefix value (eg. TEST-0000001, TEST-0000002, ...) in Sales Order header of s4hana cloud. My current development is as...
item.content:encoded:
Dear Experts,

I would like to add an auto increase numbering custom field with prefix value (eg. TEST-0000001, TEST-0000002, ...) in Sales Order header of s4hana cloud.

My current development is as following.

1. I added a custom field to Sales Order header screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modification of Header Custom Fields in Sales Documents (SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD) BAdI.

The logic is as following.

*set auto increase running no.

salesdocument_extension_out = salesdocument_extension_in.
DATA runningnum TYPE string.

IF salesdocument_extension_in-yy1_runningno_sdh IS INITIAL.
SELECT MAX( RunningNo ) FROM yy1_runningnumber INTO @DATA(current_max_id).
current_max_id = current_max_id + 1.

CONCATENATE 'TEST-' current_max_id INTO runningnum.
salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_runningno_sdh = runningnum.

* to save current increase number in Custom BO
CHECK cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

) = abap_true.

* Creation of the HTTP client to access the outbound service

* Replace the values for communication_scenario and outbound_service as required.

DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

).

* we get the csrf token to be able to make the POST call later

DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

DATA lv_s2 TYPE string VALUE '/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER?$top=1'.

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'X-CSRF-TOKEN' value = 'FETCH' ).

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).

request->set_method( 'GET' ).

TRY .

DATA(response) = lo_client->send( request ).

DATA(lv_csrf) = response->get_header_parameter( 'x-csrf-token' ).
DATA(lv_lenght) = response->get_header_parameter( 'content-length' ).

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_dealid_sdh = l_v_status.

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(l5).

data: lv_MSGV1(45) TYPE c,

lv_MSGV2(45) TYPE c.

lv_MSGV1 = l5->status_code.

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_csrf_sdh = lv_MSGV1.

lv_MSGV2 = l5->status_description.

ENDTRY.

DATA lv_json1 TYPE string VALUE '{"RunningNo":"'.

DATA lv_json2 TYPE string VALUE '"}'.

DATA lv_payload TYPE string.

CONCATENATE lv_json1 current_max_id lv_json2 INTO lv_payload.

*DATA: lv_payload TYPE string VALUE '{ "RunningNo": "10", "SalesOrder": "50" }'.

DATA(request1) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

*DATA lv_s1 TYPE string VALUE 'YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER'.

request1->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'x-csrf-token' value = lv_csrf ).

request1->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).

request1->set_method( 'POST' ).

request1->set_body( lv_payload ).

TRY .

DATA(response1) = lo_client->send( request1 ).

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx1).

ENDTRY.

ENDIF.

 

This logic works for increasing number.

But, the problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Sales Order screen without saving or with saving.

So, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Sales Order screen just for looking information.

 

So, I would like to ask some questions.

For In-App Extensibility,

1. Is there any condition that can control to trigger the BAdI logic when only I click 'Save' button?

2. Is there any build-in auto increase number function that can be used in any BAdI?

 

For Developer Extensibility,

1. Is it possible to add an auto increase number custom field using ADT?

If it is possible to do, could you please share some information or give guidelines.

 

If there is any unclear points in my question, please ask me details.

And also, if there is any workarounds that can be fulfilled this request, please give me some advices.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

item.title: Submit program with GUI status parameters (EA60, REAPRIN0, Print Parameters)
item.description: Hello and thank you all in advance! I need to make a custom program that uses the functionality of EA60 transaction with custom printing parameters. So I tried to use SUBMIT REAPRIN0 (the progr...
item.content:encoded:
Hello and thank you all in advance!

I need to make a custom program that uses the functionality of EA60 transaction with custom printing parameters. So I tried to use SUBMIT REAPRIN0 (the program behing EA60) with my parameters:

SUBMIT reaprin0 WITH opbel IN so_opbel
WITH ergrd = '04'
WITH invoiced = 'X'
WITH printparams = gs_printparams
WITH para_set = 'X'.

The problem is that while opbel, ergrd, invoiced can be passed, printparams and para_set can't be passed to program becouse these are not on the selection sreen of it. Print parameters can be set by pressing a button on the GUI status 'SEL' application toolbar named 'Print Parameters', that calls a modal dialogue box with combobox. I get this window at the 8th level in the stack:

Please help me to solve this problem.

Thanks!

item.title: Transport log of TR in Eclipse ADT - S/4 HANA Public Cloud
item.description: ...ROD or not. To verify, I have to go in QA system and check the TR.  Did any one face this issue or is other any other way to check TR log in S/4 HANA Public cloud.
item.content:encoded:
Hello Experts,

Once TR is released from Dev system and imported in QA/PROD system I see that transport log is not updated in DEV system(checked in Eclipse ADT) to show whether TR is imported in QA/PROD or not.

To verify, I have to go in QA system and check the TR. 

Did any one face this issue or is other any other way to check TR log in S/4 HANA Public cloud.

item.title: How to get the description for a component with no Material number in CO02/CO03
item.description: Hello, For a selection i need to get the description of all elements in the components tab of CO02/CO03  but some of them are present without a material. Any idea of how they can be selected ...
item.content:encoded:
Hello,

For a selection i need to get the description of all elements in the components tab of CO02/CO03 

but some of them are present without a material.

Any idea of how they can be selected or read either via Selection or FM?

Thanks for reading

item.title: Help to convert internal table into excel format
item.description: Hello!  I need help to convert an internal table with fields exported from table RKWA into excel format to be send by email attachment, using the standard function module “SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_...
item.content:encoded:
Hello! 

I need help to convert an internal table with fields exported from table RKWA into excel format to be send by email attachment, using the standard function module “SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1”. 

Appreciate all the help I can get, thanks!

item.title: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Customer Materials using Developer Extensibility
item.description: Dear Experts, I am creating a custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Materials of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility. And I would like to ask some questions related to this creation. for thi...
item.content:encoded:
Dear Experts,

I am creating a custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Materials of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility.

And I would like to ask some questions related to this creation.

for this app, I found the entity named I_CustomerMaterial, I_CustomerMaterialTP and I_CustomerMaterial_2 in eclipse ABAP development tools.

But these all 3 entities cannot used in ABAP logic.

The following error occurs.

So, I checked in Released Objects and in Released Objects, all these 3 entities do not exist.

Is it the reason why the above error occurs?

And I would like to ask that if is there any other way to create custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Material or it cannot be possible to create custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Material?

If there is any unclear point in my question, pleas ask me for details.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

item.title: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Purchasing Info Record using Developer Extensibility
item.description: Dear Experts, I would like to create custom Fiori app for Manage Purchasing Info Record app of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility (CDS views of Eclipse ABAP development tools). And there ar...
item.content:encoded:
Dear Experts,

I would like to create custom Fiori app for Manage Purchasing Info Record app of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility (CDS views of Eclipse ABAP development tools).

And there are some difficulties encountered in developing this custom Fiori app.

1. "Supplier does not exists" error keeps occurring if the value selected from the custom app is used because it only has length 8.

Standard value length of Supplier field is 10.

So, it is ok if fixed value is used in the logic by adding leading zeros up to length 10.

Is there any entity that have length 10 automatically in CDS Views or is there any way to fix this error?

In metadata extension, I used the following entity and entity name for this selection.

2. Although creating Purchasing Info Record using custom Fiori app is ok, updating is not ok because from ABAP logic, I cannot get Info Record Number that is system auto-generated.

I need to use this Info Record Number as key in Update Entity ABAP logic.

So, I would like to ask that if is there any way to update Purchasing Info Record without using Purchasing Info Record Number or is there any way (logic) to get Purchasing Info Record Number?

If there is any unclear point in my questions, please ask me for details.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

item.title: BOM components to add in CO01 from custom table.
item.description: Hi All, While creating Production order in CO01 tcode in components overview user need to add components for some particular materials. These materials and components with all the necessary fields i...
item.content:encoded:
Hi All,

While creating Production order in CO01 tcode in components overview user need to add components for some particular materials. These materials and components with all the necessary fields is maintained in a custom table. So we need to give a custom button and when user click on the button all components maintained for that materials should get added to the component overview in CO01. Kindly let me know how to add multiple line items in components.

 

Regards,

Pritam

item.title: How to color individual cell in dynamic cl salv table
item.description: Hi experts  I'm trying to color cell values that are not equal to 0, but I'm getting this entire cell column color. can you please check my code snippet?   data: t_color type lvc...
item.content:encoded:
Hi experts 

I'm trying to color cell values that are not equal to 0, but I'm getting this entire cell column color.

can you please check my code snippet?

 

  data: t_color  type lvc_t_scol,
        lt_color type lvc_t_scol,
        ls_color type lvc_s_scol.
  data : gr_struct_typ    type ref to  cl_abap_datadescr,
         gr_dyntable_typ  type ref to  cl_abap_tabledescr,
         ls_component     type         cl_abap_structdescr=>component,
         gt_component     type         cl_abap_structdescr=>component_table.
  field-symbols: <gfs_line>,
                 <gfs_line1>,
                 <gfs_line2>,
                 <gfs_line12>,
                 <gfs_dyn_table>  type standard table,
                 <gfs_dyn_struct> type any, "STANDARD TABLE ,
                 <gfs_dyn_table2> type standard table,
                 <fs_color>       type lvc_t_scol.

  " for alv color
  ls_component-name = 't_color'. " <fs_frt>-Z_HEADER.
  ls_component-type ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( t_color ).
  append ls_component to gt_component.
  "table 1
  gr_struct_typ  ?= cl_abap_structdescr=>create( p_components = gt_component ).
  gr_dyntable_typ = cl_abap_tabledescr=>create( p_line_type = gr_struct_typ ).

  create data:
  gt_dyn_table type handle gr_dyntable_typ,
  gw_dyn_line type handle gr_struct_typ,
  gw_dyn_line1 type handle gr_struct_typ.

  assign gt_dyn_table->* to <gfs_dyn_table>.
  assign gw_dyn_line->* to <gfs_line>.
  assign gw_dyn_line1->* to <gfs_line12>.

Loop itab 
         loop itab2
        assign component 't_color'  of structure <gfs_line> to <fs_color>.
            if <fs3> is assigned.
           
            <fs3> = <fs1> - <fs2>.

                     if <fs3> ne 0.
                      ls_color-fname     = c_diffheader.
                      ls_color-color-col = 6.
                      ls_color-color-int = 1.
                      ls_color-color-inv = 0.
                      append ls_color to lt_color.
                       clear ls_color.
                      <fs_color> = lt_color.
                     endif.
            endif.
      endloop. "itab2
at end of row.
      append <gfs_line> to <gfs_dyn_table>.
      clear: <gfs_line>.
    endat.
endloop.
"display
data  :  lo_cols        type ref to cl_salv_columns,
         lo_salv_table  type ref to cl_salv_table,
         lo_column      type ref to cl_salv_column,
         lo_columns     type ref to cl_salv_columns_table,
         l_gr_functions type ref to cl_salv_functions.

  try.
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        importing
          r_salv_table = lo_salv_table
        changing
          t_table      = <gfs_dyn_table> ).
    catch cx_salv_msg.

  endtry.
" get columns object
  lo_cols = lo_salv_table->get_columns( ).
  "Set color
  lo_salv_table->get_columns( )->set_color_column( 't_color' ).

  lo_salv_table->display( ).

 

Please help

item.title: Module pool. Read new row value
item.description: I have made a table control with fields from 3 standard tables. Everything is working fine but when i add a new row by push button, the new line gets added and it auto populate Item number. But&nbsp...
item.content:encoded:
I have made a table control with fields from 3 standard tables. Everything is working fine but when i add a new row by push button, the new line gets added and it auto populate Item number.

But  after that when I enter other data like matnr maktx in the table control and press on SAVE button, these values are not captured. Please help me with this, with any sample code.

In the internal table i have only item number and rest fields are blank for that new row.

item.title: RAP: Derived types not showing up in behavior pool for save methods
item.description: Team, System: S4 1909 FPS02 I am not able to get the derived types in saver methods.   Ideally the type should be something like Entity\\child but instead i am getting type data....
item.content:encoded:
Team,


System: S4 1909 FPS02


I am not able to get the derived types in saver methods.

 


Ideally the type should be something like Entity\\child but instead i am getting type data.

I have no issues with behavior handler methods


Regards,
Vishnu

item.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Connection to ABAP Enviornment on BTP trial not working IOLayer Error: Error [IO
item.description: Hello Experts, I have created an Analytic query in abap trial enviornment in BTP When i try to create a connection from SAC to SAP BTP ABAP Trial, I am having IOLayer Error: Error [IOLayer]: (...
item.content:encoded:
Hello Experts,

I have created an Analytic query in abap trial enviornment in BTP When i try to create a connection from SAC to SAP BTP ABAP Trial, I am having IOLayer Error: Error [IOLayer]: (#2001) JSON.parse: unexpected issue.

How to fix it, OR we are never allowed to access ABAP trial from SAC.

Please guide.

Regards,

Vaishali.

item.title: ADT Source code
item.description: Hi colleagues.  I have an idea to develop some eclipse plugin for ABAP development. And I want to use some classes from adt plugin. Where I can find source code of adt plugin or some adt class ...
item.content:encoded:
Hi colleagues. 

I have an idea to develop some eclipse plugin for ABAP development. And I want to use some classes from adt plugin. Where I can find source code of adt plugin or some adt class description. Java doc will be helpful. Where I can find what information?

item.title: SAP ALL MODULES OBJECTS LINKAGE
item.description: Hi Folks , I have a critical question which is running in my mind long back onwards As we all know that SAP Is combination of several modules and in modules we have mutiple objects associated with i...
item.content:encoded:
Hi Folks , I have a critical question which is running in my mind long back onwards

As we all know that SAP Is combination of several modules and in modules we have mutiple objects associated with it. My question is how all these objects are interlinked eg say material will be created , we have bill of materials, we have material consumption , materials are used in goods receipt etc .

I wanted to have a flow chart / algorithm / clear cut explanation of all these objects linkage and why we are doing these in detailed format please.

ABAP Development SAP BTP, ABAP environment NW ABAP Integration Technology (ALE)  MM (Materials Management) FIN (Finance) SRM Purchase Order EWM - Warehouse Order Processing

item.title: Dec.EWM 9.3 Custom code Migration to S/4 HANA 2021 Embedded EWM
item.description: Hello Experts We are migrating from Dec SCM EWM 9.3 to S/4 HANA 2021 Embedded EWM. Our goal is to migrate the custom code for this migration, and for that, we are referring to the attached Migration...
item.content:encoded:
Hello Experts

We are migrating from Dec SCM EWM 9.3 to S/4 HANA 2021 Embedded EWM. Our goal is to migrate the custom code for this migration, and for that, we are referring to the attached Migration Guide "How to Migrate from SAP EWM (Business Suite) to EWM Based on SAP S/4HANA."

However, we have noticed that there is no clear process mentioned in section 3.1 of the guide for custom code migration. We intended to use the Import/Export mechanism but found that transaction codes like CG3Y and CG3Z are not supported in the source EWM system version 9.3.

Anyone has experience with such scenario & guide further on this? We explored other options like FM- ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER, but it is not suitable for us & is dependent on the service provider. 

Thanks & Regards,

Sagar

item.title: How to add auto increase number custom field to Sales Order Header
item.description: Hi Experts, I would like to add an auto increase numbering custom field with prefix value (eg. TEST-0000001, TEST-0000002, ...) in Sales Order header of s4hana cloud. My current development is as f...
item.content:encoded:
Hi Experts,

I would like to add an auto increase numbering custom field with prefix value (eg. TEST-0000001, TEST-0000002, ...) in Sales Order header of s4hana cloud.

My current development is as following.

1. I added a custom field to Sales Order header screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modification of Header Custom Fields in Sales Documents (SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD) BAdI.

The logic is as following.

*set auto increase running no.

salesdocument_extension_out = salesdocument_extension_in.
DATA runningnum TYPE string.

IF salesdocument_extension_in-yy1_runningno_sdh IS INITIAL.
SELECT MAX( RunningNo ) FROM yy1_runningnumber INTO @DATA(current_max_id).
current_max_id = current_max_id + 1.

CONCATENATE 'TEST-' current_max_id INTO runningnum.
salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_runningno_sdh = runningnum.

* to save current increase number in Custom BO
CHECK cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

) = abap_true.

* Creation of the HTTP client to access the outbound service

* Replace the values for communication_scenario and outbound_service as required.

DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(

communication_scenario = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK'

outbound_service = 'YY1_RUNNINGNUM_ACNK_REST'

).

* we get the csrf token to be able to make the POST call later

DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

DATA lv_s2 TYPE string VALUE '/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER?$top=1'.

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'X-CSRF-TOKEN' value = 'FETCH' ).

request->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).

request->set_method( 'GET' ).

TRY .

DATA(response) = lo_client->send( request ).

DATA(lv_csrf) = response->get_header_parameter( 'x-csrf-token' ).
DATA(lv_lenght) = response->get_header_parameter( 'content-length' ).

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_dealid_sdh = l_v_status.

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(l5).

data: lv_MSGV1(45) TYPE c,

lv_MSGV2(45) TYPE c.

lv_MSGV1 = l5->status_code.

*salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_csrf_sdh = lv_MSGV1.

lv_MSGV2 = l5->status_description.

ENDTRY.

DATA lv_json1 TYPE string VALUE '{"RunningNo":"'.

DATA lv_json2 TYPE string VALUE '"}'.

DATA lv_payload TYPE string.

CONCATENATE lv_json1 current_max_id lv_json2 INTO lv_payload.

*DATA: lv_payload TYPE string VALUE '{ "RunningNo": "10", "SalesOrder": "50" }'.

DATA(request1) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).

*DATA lv_s1 TYPE string VALUE 'YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER_CDS/YY1_RUNNINGNUMBER'.

request1->set_header_parameter( exporting name = 'x-csrf-token' value = lv_csrf ).

request1->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).

request1->set_method( 'POST' ).

request1->set_body( lv_payload ).

TRY .

DATA(response1) = lo_client->send( request1 ).

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx1).

ENDTRY.

ENDIF.

 

This logic works for increasing number.

But, the problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Sales Order screen without saving or with saving.

So, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Sales Order screen just for looking information.

 

So, I would like to ask some questions.

For In-App Extensibility,

1. Is there any condition that can control to trigger the BAdI logic when only I click 'Save' button?

2. Is there any build-in auto increase number function that can be used in any BAdI?

 

For Developer Extensibility,

1. Is it possible to add an auto increase number custom field using ADT?

If it is possible to do, could you please share some information or give guidelines.

 

If there is any unclear points in my question, please ask me details.

And also, if there is any workarounds that can be fulfilled this request, please give me some advices.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

item.title: Two dependent Custom OVS in S4 hana
item.description: Dear SAP Expert,    I have created a custom BO with header level and item level I want to add two OVS type custom fields in Manage Sales Order app.  The first OVS field will show the h...
item.content:encoded:
Dear SAP Expert, 
 
I have created a custom BO with header level and item level
I want to add two OVS type custom fields in Manage Sales Order app. 
The first OVS field will show the header level data of custom BO that I have created. 
The second OVS field need to show the item level data of chosen header level data in first OVS field. 
It's like I want the dependent OVS fields.
 
Below is the way I have tried. 
Step 1 : Create a custom BO with header and item level. 
Step 2 : Create a Custom CDS view with the Value Help scenario type. In the elements tab, added the elements that I need and made key to both headerID and itemID
Step 3 : Create Custom field with the "Code List based on CDS View" type using the custom CDS view created in Step3. 
Step 4 : Add the custom field to "Manage Sales Order" app. 
 
The result  : 1. Both OVS fields showed all header and item level fields. 
         
Header Level OVS   
 
Item Level OVS 
2. I need to clear the filter value in header OVS field if I want to choose second time.
 
Filter value added when choose the value in header OVS
What I want : Header OVS need to show only the header level fields and item OVS need to show only the item level fields. I don't want to clear the filter value and the OVS field should be able to choose as much as I want. If the chosen header ID is changed, the value in item OVS should also change.

Header OVS I need:
Item OVS I need: The info is shown based on the chosen data in header OVS
 
Does anyone done like that development in S4 hana using Key User Extensibility.
Could you please provide the documentation or any idea?
 
If we cannot do using Key User Extensibility, is there a way we can do via Eclipse using developer extensibility. 

If there is any unclear points in my question, please feel free to ask me details.

And also, if there is any workarounds that can be fulfilled this request, please give me some advices.

 
Thanks in advance.
 
Best Regards, 
Pyae

item.title: How to add extension field from developer extensibility?
item.description: I would like to add extension field in Purchase Order from developer extensibility. When I try to add custom field in standard bo, error occurs as below. Is there any steps to add extension fiel...
item.content:encoded: I would like to add extension field in Purchase Order from developer extensibility. When I try to add custom field in standard bo, error occurs as below. Is there any steps to add extension fields from developer extensibility?

item.title: Related to PDF attachment Mail program
item.description: Hello Guru's, I have implemented BADi for PO where we need to trigger the mail after saving or posting the document and the mail consists of a PDF attachment.  I am facing a problem while addi...
item.content:encoded:
Hello Guru's,

I have implemented BADi for PO where we need to trigger the mail after saving or posting the document and the mail consists of a PDF attachment.

 I am facing a problem while adding the attachment. The code is working fine in Dev but giving the problem in Quality and I am not getting

why it failed in quality.

Further analysis, I have debugged the method ADD_ATTACHMENT  in which there is class CL_BCS_BODYPART_DB( BCS: Body Part DB ) inside this class method PUT_INTO_KPRO

having the FM SDOK_PHIO_STORE_CONTENT where the Exception No_content is getting triggered.

So I request that if anyone faces the issue and has a solution, please let me know.

 

 CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_OTF'
                  EXPORTING
                    FORMAT                = 'PDF'
                    MAX_LINEWIDTH         = 132
                  IMPORTING
                    BIN_FILESIZE          = V_LEN_IN
                    BIN_FILE              = D_BINFILE
                  TABLES
                    OTF                   = I_OTF
                    LINES                 = I_TLINE
                  EXCEPTIONS
                    ERR_MAX_LINEWIDTH     = 1
                    ERR_FORMAT            = 2
                    ERR_CONV_NOT_POSSIBLE = 3
                    OTHERS                = 4.
                IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.

                ELSE .
*convert xstring to binary
                  CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
                    EXPORTING
                      BUFFER     = D_BINFILE
                    TABLES
                      BINARY_TAB = T_BINTAB.
*subject email
                  D_SUBJECT = | 'PO' { IM_EBELN } 'Ver' { GV_CNT } 'from JAKSON Group|.
*write body mail
                  DATA   LANGUAGE  TYPE  THEAD-TDSPRAS VALUE 'EN'.

                  CALL FUNCTION 'READ_TEXT'
                    EXPORTING
                      ID                      = 'ST'
                      LANGUAGE                = LANGUAGE
                      NAME                    = 'ZPO_ME28_MAIL_BODY'
                      OBJECT                  = 'TEXT'
                    TABLES
                      LINES                   = LINES
                    EXCEPTIONS
                      ID                      = 1
                      LANGUAGE                = 2
                      NAME                    = 3
                      NOT_FOUND               = 4
                      OBJECT                  = 5
                      REFERENCE_CHECK         = 6
                      WRONG_ACCESS_TO_ARCHIVE = 7
                      OTHERS                  = 8.
                  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
                  ELSE.
                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '&im_ebeln&' IN TABLE LINES WITH IM_EBELN.
                    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'gv_cnt' IN TABLE LINES WITH GV_CNT.
                    LOOP AT LINES INTO DATA(WA_LINE).
                      wa_body-LINE = WA_LINE-TDLINE.
                      APPEND WA_BODY to T_BODYMAIL.
                    ENDLOOP.


                  ENDIF.
                  LO_SEND_REQST = CL_BCS=>CREATE_PERSISTENT( ).
                  LO_DOCUMENT   = CL_DOCUMENT_BCS=>CREATE_DOCUMENT( I_TYPE    = 'HTM'
                                                                    I_TEXT    = T_BODYMAIL
                                                                    I_SUBJECT = D_SUBJECT ).
*attchment doc & pass the document to send request
                  D_FLNAME = |{ IM_EBELN }_{ GV_CNT }_{ GV_VER_DAT }_{ LV_NAME_ORG } |.
                  CALL METHOD LO_DOCUMENT->ADD_ATTACHMENT
                    EXPORTING
                      I_ATTACHMENT_TYPE    = 'PDF'
                      I_ATTACHMENT_SUBJECT = D_FLNAME
                      I_ATT_CONTENT_HEX    = T_BINTAB.
                  CALL METHOD LO_SEND_REQST->SET_DOCUMENT( LO_DOCUMENT ).
*set sap username as sender
                  LO_SENDER = CL_SAPUSER_BCS=>CREATE( 'WF-BATCH' ).
                  CALL METHOD LO_SEND_REQST->SET_SENDER
                    EXPORTING
                      I_SENDER = LO_SENDER.
*set recipient
                  LOOP AT IT_EMAIL INTO DATA(WA_EMAIL).
                    D_EMAIL = WA_EMAIL-SMTP_ADDR.

                    LO_RECIPIENT = CL_CAM_ADDRESS_BCS=>CREATE_INTERNET_ADDRESS( D_EMAIL ).
                    CALL METHOD LO_SEND_REQST->ADD_RECIPIENT
                      EXPORTING
                        I_RECIPIENT  = LO_RECIPIENT
                        I_EXPRESS    = 'X'
                        I_COPY       = ' '
                        I_BLIND_COPY = ' '
                        I_NO_FORWARD = ' '.
                  ENDLOOP.
*send email
                  LO_SEND_REQST->SET_SEND_IMMEDIATELY( 'X' ).
                  CALL METHOD LO_SEND_REQST->SEND( ).
                  COMMIT WORK.
                ENDIF.
              ENDIF.

 

Regards,

Rishi

@Sandra_Rossi 

@SAPSupport

item.title: ME23N + Relationships + Sales Mail IDs
item.description: Hello Folks, I am going into ME23n Double clicking on Supplier and then clicking on Relationships button and navigating to the tab " Has Contact Person ". Now I want to fetch the mail IDs that w...
item.content:encoded:
Hello Folks,

I am going into ME23n

Double clicking on Supplier

and then clicking on Relationships button

and navigating to the tab " Has Contact Person ".

Now I want to fetch the mail IDs that were maintained only for SALES.

Is there any function module to fetch this information ?

Or

What are the tables that we can refer to ?

Kindly throw some light on the above mentioned queries.

Thanks,

K.Kiran.
